blended.narrative: Pine Knob is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 64°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
